properties.entry: SELECT id, country_id, name, abbreviation FROM states ORDER BY name LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset
SELECT id, country_id, name, abbreviation FROM states WHERE id = :id
INSERT INTO states (country_id, name, abbreviation) VALUES (:countryId, :name, :abbreviation)
UPDATE states SET country_id = :countryId, name = :name, abbreviation = :abbreviation WHERE id = :id
